# RAOS — POS tizimi (Tezcode)

> RAOS — O'zbekiston chakana do'konlari uchun universal POS (Point of Sale —
> savdo-kassa) tizimi. Kassa, ombor hisobi, Soliq.uz fiskal integratsiya va
> AI hisobotlar bitta platformada. Yaratuvchi: Tezcode (tezcode.dev),
> Toshkent, O'zbekiston.

## About

RAOS is a point-of-sale system built for retail businesses in Uzbekistan
and Central Asia: clothing stores, stationery shops, wholesale traders,
cosmetics and general retail. It works offline-first — sales continue even
without internet and sync automatically when connection returns.

## Key features

- Soliq.uz fiscal integration (Uzbekistan tax compliance, QR fiscal receipts)
- Offline-first architecture — POS keeps working without internet
- Inventory and warehouse management (ombor hisobi)
- AI-powered daily reports ("AI Night Cashier" — morning summary via Telegram)
- Multi-branch support from a single owner app (iOS + Android)
- Cashier app (Android) + Owner app (iOS/Android) + Web
- Bilingual interface: Uzbek and Russian (English available)

## Pricing

- Starter: 249,000 UZS/month — 1 branch, core features, Soliq.uz integration
- Growth: 449,000 UZS/month — 3 branches, AI reports, extended inventory
- Pro: 799,000 UZS/month — unlimited branches, full AI analytics, API access

## Company

- Product: RAOS (raos.uz)
- Parent company: Tezcode — AI Software Factory, Tashkent, Uzbekistan (tezcode.dev)
- Founder: Bekzod Mirzaaliyev
- GitHub: https://github.com/AI-automatization
